entries.source: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: 상호작용형 수업는 수동적으로 답만 모으는 대신 AI를 학습에 집중해 활용하는 방식입니다. 이 모드는 특정 학습 과제를 중심으로 만들어졌습니다. 해 보기, 보기, 비교하기, 고치기, 숙달 증명을 통해 배웁니다. The 앱 builds a 실시간 수업 canvas around 당신의 목표 instead of turning 수업 into a long 채팅. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."

entries.source: Start the live mode at Interactive Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Quiz me on Trivia. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of 하나 giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a 목표, try something, get 피드백, repair the weak spot, and choose the 다음 행동.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: That focus matters. A general chatbot can 답 almost anything, but a 학습 모드 gives the conversation a shape. It nudges 당신 toward the kind of 생각, 연습, 피드백, or exploration that helps the 아이디어 stick.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.

entries.source: Use Interactive Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: 빠르게 시작하면서도 나에게 맞게 조정되는 세션을 원할 때 상호작용형 수업를 사용하세요. 첫 목표는 그럴듯하게 보이는 것이 아니라 다음 단계가 가능하다고 느끼게 하는 것입니다.
